title: Global backbone: Yggdrasil integration for inter-mesh routing
description: Global-backbone epic for extending stable per-node native Yggdrasil 0200::/8 /128 addresses beyond a local LICHEN mesh. Baseline LICHEN routes these addresses locally and does not assign ULA. Global forwarding remains blocked until a constrained node can participate in Yggdrasil under its own Ed25519 key without gateway key custody or source spoofing.
notes: Phase decision (2026-07-20): local native 0200::/8 addressing stays in the baseline, but planetary Yggdrasil participation is explicitly deferred until project-LICHEN-2t96 demonstrates authenticated native-/128 packets over physical LoRa. After packets are in the air, project-LICHEN-zt3c.2 may design constrained per-node Yggdrasil participation. No gateway impersonation, 0300::/8 substitution, or private-key export in the meantime.
